title: RTX ON EXPANDED
description: The better version of RTX ON with expanded biomes and higher quality
body: The long awaited sequel to the RTX ON franchise is here! The RTX ON EXPANDED mod for Minecraft enhances both the visual quality and the gameplay experience. It introduces numerous new biomes such as shattered biomes, floating islands, deeper oceans and almost +150 more. Each biome is large and richly detailed, taking the game to a new level of immersion and realism; it even includes VR which can further expand Minecraft's realism! So go and install this great expansion to the famous RTX ON. Please be aware that the eating animations mod doesn't work currently and the FPS may drop when first loading the game so please be patient when the game is loading first.
